title: Smooth Standard Galactic Alphabet
description: Replaces the English alphabet with the Standard Galactic Alphabet from Commander Keen.
body:
This resource pack replaces the english alphabet with the Standard Galactic Alphabet from Commander Keen, which is also the text used in the Minecraft Enchanting Table. It also makes all other characters smooth.

I did this by taking the vanilla tweaks smoother font resource pack (credit to the Faithful Team!) and replacing the alphabet in the file "ascii.png" with the alphabet from the file "ascii_sga.png".

I'm pretty sure this should work in all versions, because all it replaces is the font.

this resource pack is pretty impractical.
